description: Propagate OpenAPI summary/description into MCP tool descriptions and param schemas.

parallelizationNotes.wave2: T1.1/T1.2 (parser summary+param desc) and T1.3 (validator schema merge) all depend only on T0.1 (model fields) — safe to run in parallel.
parallelizationNotes.wave3: Generator (task 5) needs both model fields (1) and parser summary read (2) — param-description tasks (3,4) not required for generator, only for schema output.
